faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the product and billing. Can't find the answer you're looking for?

items.q: How fast can we migrate from our current CRM?
items.a: Most agencies are up and running within 48 hours. Our dedicated onboarding team handles the data migration from your existing spreadsheets or CRM (Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive) for free on the Growth plan and above.

items.q: Is Propflow compliant with GDPR and data privacy laws?
items.a: Yes. We are fully GDPR and SOC-2 Type II compliant. Your data is encrypted at rest and in transit using bank-grade AES-256 standards, ensuring your client information remains secure and confidential.

items.q: Can I customize the pipelines and workflows?
items.a: Absolutely. Propflow is built to adapt to your specific agency processes. You can create custom deal stages, automated triggers, and mandatory fields to ensure your team follows your exact playbook.

items.q: Do you offer API access for custom integrations?
items.a: Yes, our Enterprise plan includes full API access and webhooks. You can connect Propflow to your custom website, accounting software, or any other proprietary tools you use.

items.q: What kind of support and training is included?
items.a: All plans include 24/7 email support and access to our knowledge base. Growth and Enterprise plans receive a dedicated Customer Success Manager and live video training sessions for your entire team.

items.q: Does Propflow work for both sales and rentals?
items.a: Yes. We support separate pipelines for Sales and Rentals/Lettings. You can manage landlords, tenants, buyers, and sellers in one unified database with distinct workflows for each transaction type.

items.q: How does the AI matching engine work?
items.a: Our AI analyzes property characteristics and buyer preferences in real-time. When a new listing triggers a match with a buyer's criteria (location, budget, features), the system automatically suggests the match and drafts a personalized email.

items.q: Is there a limit on the number of properties or contacts?
items.a: We believe in unrestricted growth. There are no limits on the number of contacts, properties, or listings you can store, even on our Starter plan. You only pay based on your team size or active deal volume.
